description: A multi-tenant SaaS for music producers, built solo from scratch. Each producer gets a branded storefront on a custom subdomain, with multi-party PayPal payment splits, durable publishing workflows for audio watermarking and YouTube uploading, and a full dashboard for beats, sales, collaborators, and analytics.
title: Bopkit

description: An interactive award show platform with 250+ ceremonies hosted, 6,000+ votes cast across 4,250+ nominations in 900+ categories. Create custom categories, run real-time voting, and deliver live presentations, all from one interface.
title: AwardBro
